milestones.title: Define first delivery milestone
milestones.goal: Replace this with the first integrated delivery objective.
milestones.delivery_target: Replace this with the reviewable deliverable that justifies milestone closure.
milestones.review_artifact: Replace this with the artifact, screen, document, branch state, or behavior the user can review.
acceptance_checks: Milestone goal is clear and user-meaningful.
milestones.notes: Add expansion_level only if the user or project explicitly chose a work-range level.
